description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the creased/docker-hugo:latest Docker image. Define a single build stage and a pages job that runs in that stage. The job should update git submodules recursively, build the site with Hugo outputting to public/ using the SITE_URL variable as the base URL, and copy the .well-known directory into public/. It should cache the public/ directory and publish it as a pages artifact. The job should only run on the master branch.
